title: Display capture returns a fresh immutable frame geometry

preconditions.description: The harness holds the inherited device-keyed lease before any device or fixture access.
The harness recorded session generation, display, layout, lock state, ATX-observable state, browser identity, and fixture identity.
The decoded stream is healthy and the display-capture capability can be enabled or removed deterministically.

fault_script.action: Set display_capture=false for the next jetkvm_display_capture call while preserving the owned session and its generation.
fault_script.expected_effect: The read ToolError is CAPABILITY_MISSING at phase validate with outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step enable_capability, details.capability display_capture, details.downstream_stage none, and zero BrowserPlane capture calls.

fault_script.action: After the successful capture case, force browser cleanup to report a bounded failure without altering image evidence.
fault_script.expected_effect: The cleanup error remains visible and no restoration is fabricated; the capability-absent case makes no capture call.

steps.expect: A newly decoded frame, opaque observation identifier, immutable source geometry, and one authorized image block.

CAPABILITY_MISSING read ToolError with phase validate, outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step enable_capability, details.permission null, details.capability display_capture, details.failed_action_index null, details.dispatched_action_count null, details.completed_action_count null, and details.downstream_stage none. Separately, ordered harness evidence records exactly zero BrowserPlane capture calls.

pass.assertion: With display_capture=false, the explicit capture call returns CAPABILITY_MISSING at phase validate with outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step enable_capability, details.capability display_capture, details.downstream_stage none, and exactly zero BrowserPlane capture calls.
Cleanup failure retains cleanup-phase evidence and does not fabricate restoration.
The frame is newer than request admission, aspect ratio is preserved without crop or upscale, and image bytes occur only in the MCP image content block.

evidence.source: The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.
The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.
The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.

restore.action: Invoke generation-correlated emergency input release when a session exists.
restore.assertion: No held key, button, wheel producer, macro, or paste producer remains.

restore.action: Stop and join any Reliable Paste producer.
restore.assertion: Reliable Paste is inactive and its correlated producer is joined.

restore.action: Verify the fixture reports zero held keys and buttons.
restore.assertion: Held keyboard and pointer state is empty.

restore.action: Close only the device session created by this story and its browser resources.
restore.assertion: No story-owned browser, channel, or device session remains.

restore.action: Clear deterministic faults and restore the recorded fixture baseline.
restore.assertion: The next story starts only after the safe baseline is verified.

privacy.rule: Persist only allowlisted opaque identifiers, sanitized versions, counts, durations, hashes, outcomes, verification, and restoration results.
